title: More levels of subitems!

posts.author: MabRoj (Mabel Rojas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!,

My name is Mabel Hernández and I’m a UX researcher at Adaptavist.

We are looking for input and feedback to understand your needs about further levels of subitems for your project/process to build a solution easier & better for you.

Would you be up for a 30-minute chat over Zoom? As a token of appreciation for your time and insight, we’re offering you a $30 voucher (or equivalent in your local currency). If you’d like to help us out, please let us know your availability using the link below:

userinterviews.com

User Interviews - Recruit better participants

The fastest & easiest way to recruit high quality participants for any type of user research study. Make better decisions by getting feedback from real users.

Thank you!
